name: Joan Cook's Tuna Fruit and Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (6-3/4 oz.) tuna with canola oil
2 cups fresh fruit and/or sweet peppers; cut into bite-sized pieces (Jean used melon, grapes, and bell peppers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna and break it into bite-size pieces.
2. Mix the fruit, pasta, onion, and tuna in a bowl.
3. Whisk together the dressing ingredients: yogurt, curry powder, lime juice, and ginger.
4. Gently mix the dressing with the fruit, pasta, and tuna until well combined.
5. Sprinkle with poppy seeds if desired.
6. Serve chilled.
